action.query: teen acne treatment options Katy Texas

content.text:
Acne is a common skin issue for teens, often caused by hormonal changes, and there are plenty of treatment options available in Katy, Texas. I'll outline some general approaches first, then highlight local providers based on recent searches. Keep in mind that the best treatment depends on the severity and type of acne—it's always a good idea to consult a dermatologist for personalized advice. Over-the-counter options like benzoyl peroxide or salicylic acid washes can help mild cases, while prescriptions (e.g., topical retinoids, antibiotics, or isotretinoin like Accutane for severe acne) might be needed for more stubborn breakouts[[1]](https://cincoderm.com/conditions/acne). Lifestyle tweaks, such as gentle skincare routines, avoiding oily products, and a balanced diet, can also make a difference.

### Local Treatment Options in Katy, TX
Here are some highly rated clinics and services specializing in teen acne treatment, based on web results from 2026. Many offer consultations for adolescents and tailor plans to age and skin type.

- **Cinco Ranch Dermatology**: They provide expert acne care for all ages, including teens, with personalized plans ranging from basic skincare regimens to advanced therapies like Accutane. Located in Katy, they focus on long-term results[[1]](https://cincoderm.com/conditions/acne)[[2]](https://www.yelp.com/search?cflt=acnetreatment&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).

- **Village Dermatology**: Board-certified dermatologists here offer treatments for acne in teens and adults, including options for mild to severe cases. They have locations in Katy and nearby Houston[[3]](https://www.villagedermatologyhouston.com/acne).

- **AcneFix**: This program is designed for teens and adults, handling various acne types and severities. It's a structured approach with safe, effective treatments[[4]](https://www.acnefix.com/locations/katy).

- **Anita's Skincare Clinic**: Their Acne Bootcamp is a 3-4 month program combining clinical treatments to get acne under control, suitable for teens[[5]](https://anitasskincareclinickaty.com/acne-bootcamp).

- **Texas Dermatology (Pediatric Focus)**: Specializes in pediatric dermatology, including acne treatments for kids and teens, with options for mild to severe cases[[6]](https://texasdermatology.com/services/pediatric-dermatology).

- **Other Notable Spots**: Places like Dermatology Associates of Katy, Advanced Dermatology, About Face & Body (with laser therapies), and Hibiscus Aesthetics also offer acne treatments, some with spa-like services for scar reduction[[7]](https://www.dermofkaty.com/acne)[[8]](https://advanceddermatologymd.com/katy-office)[[9]](https://aboutfaceandbodykaty.com/services/laser-procedures/acne-treatment-katy-tx)[[10]](https://www.hibiscus.health/facial-treatments/acne-treatment). Yelp reviews highlight top picks like Glow Up MD Med Spa for additional aesthetic options[[2]](https://www.yelp.com/search?cflt=acnetreatment&find_loc=Katy%2C+TX).

For the most current availability, check websites or call ahead—many offer virtual consultations. If acne is affecting mental health, some clinics integrate holistic support. If you need more details on a specific treatment or clinic, let me know!
